name: Adamancipator Crystal - Leonite
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔救の奇石</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アダマシア・クリスタ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－レオナイト
desc: If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of an "Adamancipator" card: You can place 1 "Adamancipator" card from your hand or GY on top of the Deck. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 FIRE Synchro Monster you control or in your GY; return it to the Extra Deck, and if you do, place this card on top of the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Adamancipator Crystal - Leonite" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of an "Adamancipator" card: You can place 1 "Adamancipator" card from your hand or GY on top of the Deck. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 FIRE Synchro Monster you control or in your GY; return it to the Extra Deck, and if you do, place this card on top of the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Adamancipator Crystal - Leonite" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of an "Adamancipator" card: You can place 1 "Adamancipator" card from your hand or GY on top of the Deck. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 FIRE Synchro Monster you control or in your GY; return it to the Extra Deck, and if you do, place this card on top of the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Adamancipator Crystal - Leonite" once per turn.

action: Places cards from the player's hand on the top of the Deck
Places cards from the player's Graveyard on the top of the Deck
Returns from your field to your Extra Deck
Returns from your Graveyard to your Extra Deck
Places itself from the player's Graveyard on the top of the Deck
